switchLegacy.title: Switch to the old version?
switchLegacy.body: You are about to leave this site and open the older portfolio. Continue?

readme.name: Osman Dayı
readme.pitch: I build modern, performant web interfaces. Currently migrating legacy systems to modern frontend architectures at Huawei.

about.heading: About me
about.body:
Hi, I'm Osman Dayı. I'm a Computer Engineering graduate and a Frontend Developer with around 3 years of experience. My career has mostly focused on migrating legacy systems to modern frontend architectures, performance optimization, and building sustainable interfaces.

At Huawei, I work on migration projects involving older React stacks, vanilla JavaScript, Vue.js, and enterprise UI libraries — modernizing complex systems. In my own projects I produce user-focused, secure applications with React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and various state management solutions.

For a short period I ran my own office, building CRM and ERP solutions and an integration product that lets you manage multiple e-commerce platforms from a single panel.

I adapt quickly to new projects and aim to add value through curiosity and problem solving.

huawei.bullets: At Huawei I'm primarily involved in frontend migration projects.

nbi.title: NBI (Northbound Interface)
nbi.bullets: Worked on critical modules: server information, network inventory, device statuses, system integrations and operator-based data management.||Because the project used an older React version and a Huawei-internal legacy UI library, many problems had to be solved with vanilla JavaScript.||With limited debugging tooling, I took ownership of the hardest parts and reduced the technical load on the team using my vanilla JS experience.||Took an active role in refactor, debugging and performance work.

sc.title: Supply Chain
sc.bullets: Migrating a project originally built with Webix UI to a modern stack.||Learned Vue.js quickly to onboard onto the migration.||Rebuilt pages using Huawei's in-house Aurora UI library to meet modern UI/UX standards.||Helped migrate pages quickly, sustainably and in a way that scales.

azetech.bullets: Built Dijirack, an IT monitoring application.||Built responsive, user-friendly interfaces with MUI.||Implemented JWT-based authentication and authorization for secure access.||Used React Query to manage asynchronous state effectively.||Used ApexCharts for user-friendly charts and diagrams.||Built interactive forms with Formik.||Used REST APIs and proper protocols for secure data transfer.||Built cabinet and topology visualizations with React Flow.

hakmar.bullets: Built various mobile applications with Flutter and Firebase during my internship — Quiz App, BMI Calculator, Flash Chat, Roll Dice, Destiny Game.

coffe.title: Coffe Pub
coffe.desc: A single-page coffee site offering information and choices for coffee lovers. Tailwind for layout, React Type Animation for entrance effects — smooth transitions and immersive visual elements.

sas.title: SAS — 30 Temmuz
sas.desc: A simple educational/marketing single-page site built with React and Tailwind.

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce
ecommerce.desc: A modern e-commerce experience with validation and user-friendly features. Tailwind UI, Zustand for state, Strapi backend, per-user persistent carts.

netflix.title: Netflix Clone
netflix.desc: Netflix UI clone — responsive grid, hover interactions, video card details.

dijirack.title: Dijirack
dijirack.desc: IT monitoring application built at Azetech. MUI, JWT auth, React Query, ApexCharts, React Flow topologies, Formik forms.

medscript.title: Medscript
medscript.desc: Analyzes potential side-effect interactions between medications for safer use. Next.js + Tailwind, Select2 components. Teknofest 2024 entry — a contribution toward safer medication usage.

terminal.help:
Available commands:
  help                show this help
  whoami              print user name
  ls                  list files
  cat <file>          dump a section
  open <file>         open a tab
  theme dark|light    switch theme
  lang en|tr          switch language
  contact             print contact info
  clear               clear scrollback
  vim|nano|sudo …     :)
terminal.vimJoke: vim is not installed. Try Cursor.
terminal.sudoJoke: osman is not in the sudoers file. This incident will be reported.
